leadText: The Whipped Dream (Japanese: ホイップポップ Whipped Pop) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VI. It allows Swirlix to evolve into Slurpuff.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] Causes Swirlix to evolve into Slurpuff when traded while holding it. This consumes the Whipped Dream.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS A soft and sweet treat made of fluffy, puffy, whipped and whirled cream. It's loved by a certain Pokémon. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V ZA A soft and sweet treat made of fluffy, puffy, whipped, and whirled cream. It's loved by a certain Pokémon.
